ns0:entry.ns0:title: BigheadSMZ/Zelda-LA-DX-HD-Updated
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/BigheadSMZ/Zelda-LA-DX-HD-Updated
Language: c%23
A PC Port of The Legend of Zelda: Link's Awakening.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Cleanuparr/Cleanuparr
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Cleanuparr/Cleanuparr
Language: c%23
Cleanuparr is a tool for automating the cleanup of unwanted or blocked files in Sonarr, Radarr, and supported download clients like qBittorrent, Deluge and Transmission.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: CoplayDev/unity-mcp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/CoplayDev/unity-mcp
Language: c%23
Unity MCP acts as a bridge, allowing AI assistants (like Claude, Cursor) to interact directly with your Unity Editor via a local MCP (Model Context Protocol) Client. Give your LLM tools to manage assets, control scenes, edit scripts, and automate tasks within Unity.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: LykosAI/StabilityMatrix
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/LykosAI/StabilityMatrix
Language: c%23
Multi-Platform Package Manager for Stable Diffusion

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NickvisionApps/Parabolic
Language: c%23
Download web video and audio

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PowerShell/PowerShell
Language: c%23
PowerShell for every system!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: QuantConnect/Lean
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/QuantConnect/Lean
Language: c%23
Lean Algorithmic Trading Engine by QuantConnect (Python, C#)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Tyrrrz/DiscordChatExporter
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Tyrrrz/DiscordChatExporter
Language: c%23
Saves Discord chat logs to a file

ns0:entry.ns0:title: babalae/better-genshin-impact
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/babalae/better-genshin-impact
Language: c%23
📦BetterGI · 更好的原神 - 自动拾取 | 自动剧情 | 全自动钓鱼(AI) | 全自动七圣召唤 | 自动伐木 | 自动刷本 | 自动采集/挖矿/锄地 | 一条龙 | 全连音游 - UI Automation Testing Tools For Genshin Impact

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bitwarden/server
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bitwarden/server
Language: c%23
Bitwarden infrastructure/backend (API, database, Docker, etc).

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

Language: c%23

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/aspnetcore
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/aspnetcore
Language: c%23
ASP.NET Core is a cross-platform .NET framework for building modern cloud-based web applications on Windows, Mac, or Linux.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/maui
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/maui
Language: c%23
.NET MAUI is the .NET Multi-platform App UI, a framework for building native device applications spanning mobile, tablet, and desktop.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/runtime
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/runtime
Language: c%23
.NET is a cross-platform runtime for cloud, mobile, desktop, and IoT apps.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: files-community/Files
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/files-community/Files
Language: c%23
A modern file manager that helps users organize their files and folders.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mRemoteNG/mRemoteNG
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mRemoteNG/mRemoteNG
Language: c%23
mRemoteNG is the next generation of mRemote, open source, tabbed, multi-protocol, remote connections manager.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: marticliment/UniGetUI
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/marticliment/UniGetUI
Language: c%23
UniGetUI: The Graphical Interface for your package managers. Could be terribly described as a package manager manager to manage your package managers

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mcmonkeyprojects/SwarmUI
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mcmonkeyprojects/SwarmUI
Language: c%23
SwarmUI (formerly StableSwarmUI), A Modular Stable Diffusion Web-User-Interface, with an emphasis on making powertools easily accessible, high performance, and extensibility.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: memstechtips/Winhance
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/memstechtips/Winhance

Application designed to optimize, customize and enhance your Windows experience.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/PowerToys
Language: c%23
Microsoft PowerToys is a collection of utilities that supercharge productivity and customization on Windows

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/mcp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/mcp
Language: c%23
Catalog of official Microsoft MCP (Model Context Protocol) server implementations for AI-powered data access and tool integration

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/semantic-kernel

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/csharp-sdk

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tModLoader/tModLoader
Language: c%23
A mod to make and play Terraria mods. Supports Terraria 1.4 (and earlier) installations

ns0:entry.ns0:title: umlx5h/LLPlayer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/umlx5h/LLPlayer
Language: c%23
The media player for language learning, with dual subtitles, AI-generated subtitles, real-time translation, and more!
